name: Platform Science Connected Fleet API
what_it_does: Platform Science REST API for connected fleet platform targeting commercial trucking. Enables AI agents to manage driver workflow and task management data from in-cab tablets for dispatch integration, handle ELD compliance and Hours of Service data retrieval for regulatory management, access vehicle diagnostic data and fault code management for predictive maintenance, retrieve driver messaging and in-cab communication data for fleet operations, manage application ecosystem integration for fleet apps (fuel, navigation, load boards), handle real-time vehicle location and trip event data for visibility, access driver performance and coaching data for safety programs, retrieve IFTA fuel tax mileage and jurisdiction data for compliance, manage fleet-level analytics and driver productivity data, and integrate fleet workflow data with TMS, dispatch, and enterprise fleet management systems.
use_cases: Integrating driver task workflows from TMS dispatch agents
Monitoring ELD compliance from fleet safety agents
Accessing vehicle diagnostics from predictive maintenance agents
Retrieving driver messaging from fleet communication agents
not_for: Consumer vehicle management without commercial trucking and ELD focus
Light-duty fleet without heavy-duty truck and commercial vehicle needs
Non-trucking industries without CDL driver and commercial vehicle compliance
best_when: A large commercial trucking fleet using Platform Science in-cab tablets wants AI agents to automate driver workflow integration, ELD monitoring, vehicle diagnostics, IFTA fuel reporting, and TMS dispatch integration.
avoid_when: SAFETY RISK: In-cab tablet automation must not distract drivers; FMCSA distracted driving regulations prohibit in-cab technology use while driving. Automated driver messaging while vehicle is in motion creates safety and regulatory violations. COMPLIANCE RISK: Automated HOS modification or ELD data tampering violates FMCSA regulations and creates significant legal liability.

auth.notes: Platform Science uses OAuth 2.0. Developer portal at developer.platformscience.com. Webhooks for fleet events. REST API with JSON. Android SDK for in-cab tablet application development. San Diego, California HQ. Strong in enterprise trucking fleets. Partnerships with Daimler, PACCAR, and Volvo Trucks for OEM integration. Partner ecosystem for fleet apps.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-vehicle monthly subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-vehicle monthly subscription; app marketplace charges for premium fleet apps
pricing.notes: San Diego, California. Founded 2015. Private ($150M+ raised). Commercial trucking technology market. OEM partnerships with major truck manufacturers (Daimler, PACCAR, Volvo). Strong in large enterprise trucking fleets. Partner ecosystem for fleet apps (fuel, navigation, load boards). Competes with Samsara and Motive for connected fleet platform market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: SAFETY RISK: Automated in-cab messaging while driving violates FMCSA distracted driving rules; implement motion detection check before any automated in-cab message delivery
ELD tamper prohibition — FMCSA prohibits ELD record modification; any automated process that could modify certified HOS records creates federal regulatory liability
OEM integration variability — Platform Science has OEM partnerships with Daimler, PACCAR, Volvo; data availability and API features may vary by truck OEM and integration depth
App marketplace ecosystem — Platform Science fleet apps (fuel, navigation) are partner apps with separate authentication; coordinate with app provider for combined workflow automation
IFTA mileage accuracy — IFTA fuel tax mileage from GPS has state border crossing detection; validate GPS mileage reconciliation against odometer readings for accurate IFTA filing
Enterprise-focused — Platform Science targets large enterprise fleets; smaller fleets may find per-vehicle pricing and enterprise feature set excessive vs. SMB-focused competitors
agent_readiness.security_notes: Commercial fleet and ELD. SOC2, FMCSA-ELD. OAuth2. US. Driver workflow and vehicle data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Connected fleet and ELD. SOC2, FMCSA. OAuth2. US. Driver and vehicle operations data.
